name: Hot Cross Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, yeast, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Stir in warm water and melted butter, then beaten eggs. Mix until smooth and elastic.
3. Add raisins and candied peel. Scrape down sides of the bowl and cover with a clean dry towel. Let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Grease 24 medium to large-sized muffin cups and spoon in batter (no more than 2/3 full).
5. Brush tops with melted butter. Cover and let rise in a warm place until almost double, about 20 - 30 minutes.
6. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for about 20 minutes or until tops are browned. Let cool on wire racks until warm, about 10 - 15 minutes.
7. Combine icing sugar with milk until smooth. Pipe crosses onto the buns using a piping bag or spoon them on top.
